title: Media attachments silently dropped in delivery and outbox
description: Both the delivery worker (delivery.rs:192-210) and the outbox endpoint (server.rs:461-478) build ActivityPub Create/Note JSON without an 'attachment' field. The post_media table is populated by webhook, feed, and CLI media processing, but the data is never read when constructing outbound activities. media::attachments_for_post() exists but is never called. Result: followers never see images attached to posts. Every post with media is delivered as text-only.
close_reason: Media attachments now included in delivery and outbox via attachments_for_post
